_comment: Account-bound bulk crafting mats that cannot be bought or sold on the TP and cannot be crafted. They accumulate for free from play (salvage, map/reward-track drops) and overflow their storage cap, so they cost 0 copper. Priced here as free byproducts so recipes consuming them are evaluable instead of disqualified as unobtainable leaves. Values are copper-per-single-unit. Extend as more free account-bound mats are confirmed.
